name: gtars
tagline: Docs-only skill wrapping the gtars Rust/Python genomic-interval toolkit (overlap, coverage, tokenization, refget, fragments).
verdict: Clean, standard-practice documentation skill. Installs via public registries (PyPI/crates.io) with no scripts, no hidden instructions, no data exfiltration. Minor polish gaps only: no explicit negative-use guidance and license field is 'Unknown'. Safe to install.

highlights.summary: No explicit 'do NOT use when' guidance anywhere in the file; a user could reach for this outside genomics contexts without being redirected.
No explicit statement of expected output/result contract for the agent (e.g. what to report back to the user after running a workflow); relies on generic code-example outputs only.
